Pair Wallet to Start

Check out the Tutorial Video

Stake SAUCE and receive xSAUCE. The Infinity Pool automatically compounds via SAUCE buybacks from three sources: HBAR native staking, farm emissions, and a portion of swap fees from all liquidity pools.

Rewards are proportional to your share of the pool, all without any risk of impermanent loss.

SaucerSwap is staked to node: LSE - Fully Operational

© 2025 SaucerSwap Labs, LLC

Introduction to SaucerSwap

SaucerSwap is a decentralized exchange on the Hedera blockchain, designed for fast, low-cost crypto swaps and secure trading experiences in DeFi.

The Advantages of SaucerSwap

With lightning-fast transactions, low fees, and enhanced liquidity, SaucerSwap provides users with an optimal environment for decentralized finance activities.

How SaucerSwap Works

SaucerSwap utilizes Hedera’s blockchain technology to facilitate secure, quick, and efficient crypto trading, empowering users with a simple interface and robust features.

Earn Rewards by Staking on SaucerSwap

Staking on SaucerSwap allows users to earn rewards while contributing to the platform’s liquidity pools, ensuring a sustainable and profitable ecosystem.

Start Trading with SaucerSwap

Connect your wallet to SaucerSwap, provide liquidity, and begin enjoying fast and secure swaps while making the most of the DeFi rewards available.

Ultra-Fast Crypto Swaps

Take advantage of SaucerSwap’s rapid transaction processing, ensuring that your trades are completed quickly and without delays.

Decentralized and Trustless Trading

With SaucerSwap, you can trade directly from your wallet without relying on a centralized authority, giving you full control over your funds.

Maximize Earnings through Staking

Stake your assets on SaucerSwap’s liquidity pools to earn a share of the rewards generated by the platform’s users and activities.

Ensuring Security with Hedera

Built on Hedera’s secure and scalable blockchain, SaucerSwap offers a highly reliable and secure platform for all your crypto trading and staking needs.

Get Involved in SaucerSwap Governance

Join the community of users who contribute to the governance of SaucerSwap, influencing the direction and future of the platform.

Future Enhancements and Features

SaucerSwap is committed to continuous improvement, with new features and integrations planned to expand its capabilities and user base.
